title: pouteria calomeris
intro: Pouteria calomeris, also known as the Kalakaua tree or White Sapote, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to the Hawaiian Islands. The medicinal properties of Pouteria calomeris include its use in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of consuming the fruit of this plant include high levels of vitamins and minerals, making it a nutritious addition to a balanced diet. Herbal preparations of Pouteria calomeris may include the use of its bark, leaves, and fruit in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and health.
